step_rationale: Platelet α-granule release product; predicts microvascular reperfusion failure (no-reflow) in STEMI.
mechanism: PDGF-BB released from activated platelets amplifies plaque inflammation and predicts microvascular thrombosis and no-reflow in acute coronary occlusion.

references.title: Targeted delivery of engineered adipose-derived stem cell secretome to promote cardiac repair after myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Journal of controlled release : official journal of the Controlled Release Society

references.title: Platelet-derived growth factor-BB is a novel inflammatory biomarker of no-reflow in STEMI patients treated with primary PCI.
